package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_fmt_log_message_in_loop: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag formatted log strings built inside loops instead of structured lazy fields.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario559Positive(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, fmt.Sprintf("%d", value))
	}
	return out
}
